title: Cobblemon - Dex Rewards
body:
Pokedex Completion Rewards for Cobblemon 1.6.1!

Adds the following commands:
- /dex rewards
- /dex reload
- /dex update <player>
- /dex reset <player>
- /dex generate

Players claim rewards from the /dex rewards GUI, they'll receive a chat message informing them that a new reward is available.

Everything is customizable through the config!

For more information, check out the [wiki](https://github.com/Unariginal/Cobblemon-DexRewards/wiki)!
